assertions: Uses file_hash for an AST-capable file when only SHA-256 is required.
Preserves the returned canonical path, size, and hash.
expected_output: Routes the hash-only request to file_hash even though the target is AST-capable.
prompt: Get a fresh whole-file SHA-256 for src/server.ts immediately before a guarded patch without reading its source content.

assertions: Batches all paths in one schema-valid file_hash call.
Does not request any file content.
expected_output: Uses one batched file_hash request for all five paths.
prompt: Refresh guarded-edit hashes for five mixed AST and non-AST files in one operation.

assertions: Does not call file_hash when source content is required.
Uses show for the named AST symbol.
Does not fall back to file_read.
expected_output: Uses show for source content and does not call file_hash.
prompt: Show the implementation body of createServer in src/server.ts.
